title: Rich Steamed Dutch Celery Bouillon
description: A savory, velvety Dutch dish featuring celery, perfect for a cozy meal.
instructions: Rinse the celery stalks under cold water, then pat them dry.
In a large pot, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the chicken broth, water, and bring to a boil.
Add the celery stalks and reduce heat to low, cover with a lid.
Steam the celery for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Remove the celery from the pot, then add the white wine and deglaze the pot, scraping the browned bits.
Add the flour to the pot, whisking to avoid lumps, and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Gradually add the heavy cream, whisking continuously, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Return the celery to the pot and simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
